title: Worker with unique: [period: 300] to dedupe retries over 5 minutes
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.WebhookNotifierWorker` (queue `:webhooks`) with `unique: [period: 300, keys: [:webhook_id]]`. perform/1 takes `%{"webhook_id" => id}` and calls `MyApp.Webhooks.notify(id)`. Return `:ok` on success, `{:error, reason}` otherwise. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/webhook_notifier_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-line addition of a properly-sized unique period; tests that `:period` is always explicit.
